text: Ever wondered why comets have dazzling tails? Comets are icy wanderers, but their journey through the solar system reveals their true beauty. As they approach the Sun, solar energy heats up the nucleus, releasing gas and dust. Sunlight and solar wind push this material away, forming bright, glowing tails that always point away from the Sun. So, a comet's tail isn't just a pretty sight—it's a cosmic dance between ice and solar power. Curious for more cosmic wonders? Like and follow for more fascinating space facts!
